 4
1<?php
2
3namespace Local\Permission\Middleware;
4
5use Closure;
6use Illuminate\Http\Request;
7use Local\Permission\Exceptions\UnauthorizedException;
8use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;
9
10/**
11 * Usage: ->middleware('permission:users.create')
12 * or ->middleware('permission:users.create|users.update') (pipe = any-of).
13 */
14class PermissionMiddleware
15{
16    public function handle(Request $request, Closure $next, string $permissions, ?string $guard = null): Response
17    {
18        $permissions = explode('|', $permissions);
19        $user = $request->user($guard);
20
21        if ($user === null || ! method_exists($user, 'hasAnyPermission') || ! $user->hasAnyPermission($permissions)) {
22            throw UnauthorizedException::forPermissions($permissions);
23        }
24
25        return $next($request);
26    }
27}

Legend

Covered by small (and larger) testsCovered by medium (and large) testsCovered by large tests (and tests of unknown size)Not coveredNot coverable
